title: cynanchum cristalinense
intro: Cynanchum cristalinense, also known as Cristalin's swallowwort, is a species of plant in the Apocynaceae family, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as dogbane or oleander. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cynanchum cristalinense include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
